_comment: Structured incompatibility catalog for programmatic detection. Used by converters to flag issues and by report.py to populate findings.

incompatibilities.description: Solr's DisMax and eDisMax query parsers have no direct equivalent in OpenSearch. Must rewrite as Query DSL with bool queries and multi_match.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Redesign all queries using OpenSearch Query DSL. eDisMax → bool + multi_match. Test each pattern with relevance comparison.

incompatibilities.description: In Solr eDisMax with sow=true, mm is evaluated per-document across all fields. In OpenSearch multi_match, it's evaluated per-field. Results may silently differ.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Use type:cross_fields in multi_match for Solr-like behavior, or decompose into explicit bool queries with outer-level minimum_should_match.

incompatibilities.description: OpenSearch defaults max_clause_count to 1024 (Solr allows much higher). Wildcard and multi-OR queries fail with 'too_many_clauses'.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Increase via cluster settings. Audit queries — rewrite to use 'terms' queries instead of many 'should' clauses.

incompatibilities.description: OpenSearch default max_result_window is 10000. Any query with from + size > 10000 throws error. Solr has no such hard limit.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Switch to search_after for deep pagination. Increase max_result_window only if truly necessary (impacts memory).

incompatibilities.description: Solr allows arbitrary mathematical scoring (product, sum, sqrt, log, etc.). OpenSearch function_score has fixed functions. Complex expressions need Painless scripts.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Use script_score with Painless for complex formulas. Benchmark — Painless scripts have performance implications at scale.

incompatibilities.description: Solr's Query Elevation Component pins documents to top. OpenSearch has no built-in equivalent.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Implement via application logic, function_score with extreme weights, or inject pinned IDs as high-boost should clauses.

incompatibilities.description: Full data pipeline language for large-scale exports and transformations. No OpenSearch equivalent.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Use search_after for exports, external tools (Spark, Flink) for processing, OpenSearch SQL/PPL for analytics.

incompatibilities.description: Solr graph query and graph streaming expressions. No OpenSearch equivalent.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Redesign using application-level traversal or external graph database.

incompatibilities.description: Solr supports cross-collection join queries. OpenSearch has no cross-index join.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Denormalize data, use nested documents, or implement application-side joins.

incompatibilities.description: Query converter may strip ^boost values from field:value^N patterns without warning, causing silent relevance regression.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Ensure boost values are preserved in conversion. Map to DSL boost parameter.

incompatibilities.description: Solr's CollapsingQParser and group=true have different semantics than OpenSearch's collapse parameter. Null handling and tie-breaking differ.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Rewrite using OpenSearch collapse parameter with inner_hits. Test thoroughly.

incompatibilities.description: Solr analyzer chains (tokenizer + filter pipeline) define how text is processed. Dropping them means different tokenization and different search results.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Convert each analyzer chain to OpenSearch analysis block. Test with _analyze API.

incompatibilities.description: Solr's copyField routes data to multiple fields at index time. Must convert to OpenSearch copy_to property on source field.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Add copy_to to source field mapping. Note: copy_to only copies values, not analyzers — target field must have its own analyzer.

incompatibilities.description: Solr supports various dynamic field patterns (*_t, *_i, attr_*, etc.). OpenSearch dynamic templates have different matching syntax.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Convert to dynamic_templates. Patterns like *_t → match:*_t with match_pattern:regex.

incompatibilities.description: Sorting/aggregating on text fields fails in OpenSearch (fielddata disabled by default). Enabling fielddata: true is a memory bomb causing CircuitBreakingException.

schema_xml: fields used for both search AND sort/facet

incompatibilities.recommendation: Use multi-field mapping: text for search, .keyword sub-field for sort/agg. NEVER enable fielddata: true in production.

incompatibilities.description: Solr allows custom similarity implementations via Java. AWS managed OpenSearch does NOT support custom plugins. Limited to built-in similarities.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Use built-in BM25 (default) and retune. If custom scorer is critical, this may block AWS managed adoption.

incompatibilities.description: Solr block join ({!child}, {!parent}) has no 1:1 mapping to OpenSearch nested type. Different query syntax and update semantics.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Map to OpenSearch nested type with explicit mapping. Rewrite join queries. Consider denormalization for simple cases.

incompatibilities.description: Solr's SortableTextField combines analysis with sort capability. No OpenSearch equivalent.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Use multi-field mapping: text sub-field for search, keyword sub-field for sorting.

incompatibilities.description: Solr explicitly marks fields as multiValued=true/false. OpenSearch has no such attribute — any field can accept an array.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Enforce single-value constraints at application layer or via ingest pipeline validation.

incompatibilities.description: Solr defaults to TF-IDF (ClassicSimilarity). OpenSearch defaults to BM25. Expect 30-40% ranking difference in top-10 results.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Establish relevance baseline BEFORE migration. Re-tune boosts and field weights. Use Quepid/RRE with judgment sets for validation.

incompatibilities.description: Solr allows storing scoring payloads in tokens. OpenSearch has limited support.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Use script_score with stored payloads or redesign scoring logic.

incompatibilities.description: OpenSearch forbids primary + replica on the same node. A 2-node Solr cluster with RF=2 needs at least 3 OpenSearch nodes.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Plan for ~2x node count. Design 3-AZ topology for production.

incompatibilities.description: Solr uses external ZooKeeper for coordination. OpenSearch uses embedded Raft consensus. Removes ZK ops overhead but loses external state visibility.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Remove ZooKeeper infrastructure. Monitor cluster state via OpenSearch APIs.

incompatibilities.description: OpenSearch blocks indexing at disk percentage thresholds (85%, 90%, 95%) even if hundreds of GB remain free on large volumes.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Check disk usage before migration. Relax thresholds if needed.

incompatibilities.description: Solr's atomic updates merge fields elegantly via transaction log. OpenSearch partial updates via _update API retrieve-merge-reindex with different concurrency semantics.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Test heavily if pipeline uses atomic updates. Consider full-document rewrites or Painless scripts.

incompatibilities.description: Solr's /get handler uses transaction log for guaranteed real-time retrieval. OpenSearch GET uses standard search semantics (eventual consistency).
incompatibilities.recommendation: Accept eventual consistency, or use explicit refresh after writes if RTG behavior is critical.

incompatibilities.description: Solr's CDCR enables async cross-datacenter replication. No direct OpenSearch equivalent.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Redesign DR via snapshots, dual-write, Kinesis streaming, or cross-cluster replication (CCR).

incompatibilities.description: Solr's updateRequestProcessorChain (Java classes preprocessing documents) has no direct equivalent.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Convert to ingest pipelines (simple), application logic (complex), or Painless scripts.

incompatibilities.description: DIH deprecated in Solr 8.6, removed in 9.0. No OpenSearch equivalent for database-to-index sync.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Replace with Logstash, Apache NiFi, OpenSearch Ingestion (Data Prepper), or custom application code.

incompatibilities.description: OpenSearch eagerly creates field types from first document seen. Numeric sent as string on doc 1 locks the type as string. No schema enforcement like Solr.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Set dynamic:strict in production mappings to force explicit field definitions.

incompatibilities.feature: Custom plugins not supported on managed service
incompatibilities.description: AWS managed OpenSearch does not support custom plugins. Limited to pre-built plugins.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Find pre-built equivalent or use self-managed OpenSearch for custom plugins.

incompatibilities.description: AWS OpenSearch Service trails open-source by 1-2 versions. Verify features against target AWS version.
incompatibilities.recommendation: Verify feature availability against target AWS version before designing around it.
